name: codex-jetbrains-mcp
author: nealzhi
description: MCP adapter that lets Codex read JetBrains selection context from the Claude Code JetBrains plugin.

scripts.check: node --check ./src/index.mjs && node --check ./src/bridge-server.mjs && node --check ./src/claude-jetbrains-client.mjs && node --check ./src/ide-discovery.mjs && node --check ./src/ws-transport.mjs && node --check ./src/hud.mjs
